title: Litensh 2.5 Inch Right Angle Hasp Lock with Key Alike, 90 Degrees Shed Padlock Hasp Staple Lock Bolt Latch Buckle for Drawers, Cupboards, Closets, Doors, Cabinets, Gates
features: Providing Security: Hasp lock with padlock and key can provide you with security and privacy to prevent strangers from invading.It can also effectively avoid the risk of children being pinched by turning over drawers and opening and closing doors at will.

Strong Material: The keyed hasp lock is made of iron, strong and durable, not easy to break and bend. The finish is polished and brushed for a smooth look that goes well with modern home decor. Beautiful appearance to match all home styles.

Easy to Use: The dresser lock is easy to install and use. During installation, you only need to find the correct position and tighten the screw. After tightening the screw, put on the buckle and lock it by rotating 90°. When unlocking, use a key to return it to 90° to unlock.
Left or Right Side can be Installed: The door lock hasp with key can be installed on the left or right side to meet your different needs. Suitable for indoor and outdoor use.

Wide Application: Cabinet locks are safe and anti-theft, can be applied to wooden doors, wooden door, drawers, luggage accessories, cabinets and desk drawers, cabinets, closets, boxes, doors, sheds, garage doors and more.
